category_sources: Official GitHub README describes rush as a command-line tool for parallelizing workflows.
source_facts.description says this is a cross-platform command-line tool for executing jobs in parallel.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official shenwei356/rush project packaged as rush-parallel in Homebrew.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface and includes installation, usage, examples, and options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/shenwei356/rush, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README compares rush to GNU parallel and documents workflow parallelization features.
